name: RabbitMQ Monitor
description: Poll a RabbitMQ queue for new messages and trigger jobs when messages are received

triggers.description: Triggers when new messages are received from the RabbitMQ queue

outputs.description: Passes message information (queue, routing_key, exchange, message_id, body, content_type) to triggered jobs via run_config

host.label: Host
host.description: RabbitMQ broker hostname or IP address

queue_name.label: Queue Name
queue_name.description: Name of the RabbitMQ queue to monitor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the RabbitMQ username (defaults to 'guest')

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the RabbitMQ password (defaults to 'guest')

use_tls.label: Use TLS
use_tls.description: Whether to use TLS for the connection

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to consume per evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
